title: 日本ダービーの後に・抜山蓋世

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a win at the Japanese Derby, Symboli
Rudolf carves her name next to the greatest
Umamusume in history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She resolves to claim another crown in the Kikuka
Sho, but her packed schedule is starting to take
its toll, and Air Groove is only getting more
concerned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, however, it's Symboli Rudolf's way or
the highway. Even a grueling race can't keep her
from her student council duties.
